name: Advanced AI Data Trainer Mastery
description: Advanced certification covering AI data training methodologies, prompt engineering, and AI output evaluation frameworks for building reliable, high-quality AI systems.

name: Data Analyst Certification
description: Comprehensive certification covering data analysis, Python, SQL, and data visualization. Practical projects applying analytics skills to real-world business problems.

name: Certification in Data Science
description: Intensive program covering machine learning, statistical analysis, Python, and data pipeline development. Hands-on projects building end-to-end ML solutions.

name: Google Data Analytics Professional Certificate
description: Eight-course program covering data analysis, SQL, R, Tableau, and data-driven decision making. Emphasis on the full data analysis process from ask to act.

name: Cisco Certified Network Associate (CCNA)
description: Foundational certification covering networking fundamentals, IP connectivity, security, and automation. Validates working knowledge of network infrastructure and protocols.

name: User Support Professional (A+)
description: CompTIA A+ equivalent certification covering hardware, software troubleshooting, networking, and technical support. Foundation for IT support and systems administration.
